parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ template: $json.brand === 'floatup' ? 'YOUR_FLOATUP_BANNERBEAR_TEMPLATE_ID' : 'YOUR_AI_COMMUNITY_BANNERBEAR_TEMPLATE_ID', modifications: [{ name: 'headline', text: ($json.image_headline || 'FLOATUP').slice(0,40) }, { name: 'subtext', text: ($json.image_subtext || '').slice(0,60) }, { name: 'brand_tag', text: $json.cta || 'floatup.app' }] }) }}
